name: mlforge
description: End-to-end ML engineering sprint system for principal/staff-level engineers: FRAME → PLAN → EXPERIMENT → EVALUATE → SHIP → MONITOR → LEARN. 19 skills + ml-expert agent connected by an artifact pipeline and gate ledger — problem framing, system design, experiment pre-registration, evaluation, release gates, canary boomerangs, retros, and compounding lessons. Tuned for AWS (EKS/ECS), behavioral and NLP problems.
